rationale: Gov't Code §2306.061 addresses standards of conduct for department directors and employees. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The director or the director's designee shall become aware of and provide to members of the board and to department employees, as often as necessary, information regarding the requirements for office or employment under this chapter
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
